channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jonathan Van Ness Radiates Resilience
item.description: The Queer Eye star and entrepreneur embraces authenticity at 39, finding strength in honesty about life's imperfections.

item.title: SSRIs May Lower Joint Replacement Risk in Osteoarthritis
item.description: Starting centrally acting analgesics in osteoarthritis patients was linked to higher long-term risk of total joint arthroplasty.

item.title: How to Achieve Your Best Sleep Ever
Caloric Restriction and Intermittent Fasting Show Mixed Longevity Results
item.description: Caloric restriction remains a robust intervention for extending lifespan, but human data on intermittent fasting is mixed.
